name: QCoDeS
description: An open-source Python framework for instrument control, measurement automation, and experiment data management in quantum labs.
whyUseIt: QCoDeS matters on the hardware side of quantum engineering because experiments depend on reliable instrument orchestration and repeatable data capture, not only clever circuits.
fieldPosition: Quantum hardware control, measurement automation, and lab orchestration
engineerWorkflow: Connect instruments, script sweeps or calibrations, collect data with metadata, then reuse the same routines as the experiment evolves.
managerExpects: Clean automation that reduces manual error and preserves traceable experiment context.
demoDescription: Automate a small parameter sweep for a mock readout or calibration experiment and log the results consistently.
beginnerMistakes: Automating without recording the experiment context clearly
Mixing quick hacks into workflows other people need to trust
